landing.eyebrow: IT Passport exam · iパス prep
landing.heroTitle: {exams} years of official past questions · {questions} problems · with AI explanations.
landing.heroBody: From 20-question category drills to full-length mock exams. AI explains every wrong answer instantly, and your mistakes flow into a smart review list.
landing.featureLibraryBody: Random 20-question sets from Strategy / Management / Technology (ストラテジ系・マネジメント系・テクノロジ系). Close your weak spots in short sessions.
landing.featureAiBody: Why the correct choice is right and why the others are wrong — per question, in Japanese, Chinese, or English. No textbook flipping.
landing.featureExamBody: 100 questions · 100 minutes · 60% to pass — exactly like the real thing. Category scores tallied automatically.
landing.bottomCtaBody: Sign in with email or Google. Progress syncs across all your devices.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read before using passnote.app
terms.translationNotice: This is an informational English translation of the Japanese terms. The Japanese version governs in case of any discrepancy.
terms.body:
## 1. Scope

These Terms govern your use of the website service "passnote.app (IT Passport Practice Notes)" (the "Service"), operated by Zhang Shifeng ("we", "us"). By using the Service you agree to these Terms.

## 2. Account

1. Some features require sign-in via email or Google account.
2. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials and may not share them with third parties.
3. You may delete your account at any time. Data handling on deletion is described in the Privacy Policy.

## 3. Paid plans and billing

1. The Service offers a free plan and a Pro membership (¥980/month tax included).
2. Pro billing is processed by Stripe.
3. New Pro subscriptions include a 3-day free trial. Cancelling during the trial avoids any charge.
4. Unless cancelled, the subscription renews automatically each month after the trial.
5. You can cancel any time from the account page. **No prorated refund is given on cancellation**, but Pro access continues to the end of the current billing period.
6. Prices and plan contents may change with prior notice.

## 4. Prohibited conduct

You must not:

- Violate laws or public order
- Infringe IP, privacy, or other rights of us or third parties
- Reproduce, redistribute, or republish Service content (questions, AI explanations) without permission
- Scrape, mass-access, or reverse-engineer the Service
- Impersonate another user or third party
- Disrupt the operation of the Service

## 5. Intellectual property

1. The Service's source code, design, logos, and AI explanations are owned by us or rightful holders.
2. The original past-exam content is copyright **Information-technology Promotion Agency, Japan (IPA)**, used by us within IPA's permitted scope.

## 6. Disclaimer

1. We make no warranty regarding the Service (including the accuracy of AI explanations). Final study and exam decisions are your own responsibility.
2. We are not liable for damages from interruption, change, or unavailability of the Service except in cases of our intent or gross negligence.
3. Third-party services we link or integrate with (Stripe, Supabase, Google AI Gateway, etc.) are governed by their own terms.

## 7. Service changes / termination

We may change, suspend, or terminate the Service with or without prior notice.

## 8. Changes to these Terms

We may revise these Terms at any time. Material changes will be announced on the Service. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

## 9. Governing law and jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by Japanese law. Disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the district court covering our principal place of business as the court of first instance.

## 10. Contact

Reach us at f.shera.09@gmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your personal data
privacy.translationNotice: This is an informational English translation of the Japanese privacy policy. The Japanese version governs in case of any discrepancy.
privacy.body:
## 1. Information we collect

In providing the Service we collect:

- **Account info**: email, basic Google profile (name, picture) when using Google sign-in
- **Learning data**: answer history, progress, chosen UI language
- **Technical info**: IP, cookies, browser/OS info, anonymized page views and Web Vitals via Vercel Analytics
- **Payment info**: card numbers etc. are processed directly by **Stripe** — we never store the card number itself, only the Stripe customer ID and subscription status.

## 2. How we use it

- Operate the Service (save progress, generate AI explanations, manage Pro)
- Respond to your inquiries
- Improve quality and prevent abuse
- Comply with legal requirements

## 3. Third parties

We share data only with the following operational service providers, only as needed:

- **Supabase** (US / Tokyo region): database and authentication
- **Stripe** (US / Japan): card payment processing
- **Vercel** (US): hosting, Analytics, Speed Insights
- **Google AI Gateway / Google Gemini**: AI explanation generation — question text and your answer letter are sent; no personally-identifying info is sent

We do not otherwise share personal data with third parties except where required by law or with your consent.

## 4. Cookies

The Service uses cookies to:

- Maintain auth sessions (issued by Supabase)
- Persist UI language preference (`NEXT_LOCALE`)
- Provide anonymous analytics via Vercel Analytics

You may disable cookies in your browser; some Service features may stop working as a result.

## 5. Your rights

You may request, regarding your personal data:

- Disclosure, correction, addition, or deletion
- Stop of use or third-party transfer

Contact f.shera.09@gmail.com. After identity verification we will respond in a reasonable timeframe. You can also delete your account from the account page at any time.

## 6. Retention

Data is retained while your account is active or as required by law for the purposes stated. After an account deletion request we delete data within a reasonable time, except for backups required for operations.

## 7. Changes

This policy may be revised. Material changes will be announced on the Service.

## 8. Contact

Reach us at f.shera.09@gmail.com.
